title: Xcel Energy Inc. to Webcast Annual Meeting of Shareholders
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Xcel Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: XEL) will hold its 2023 Annual Meeting of Shareholders virtually at 11:00 a.m. central time on May 24, 2023. Shareholders of record at the close of business on the record date, March 27, 2023, are invited to participate. Shareholders of record can attend the meeting online at www.virtualshareholdermeeting.com/XEL2023 and can vote during the meeting using the control number found on their proxy card or Notice of Internet Availability of Pro.

title: Xcel Energy: Steady, Stable Returns
text: Over the past 6 years, Xcel has produced steady earnings growth, around 6% per year. In line with EPS growth, Xcel has increased dividends by an average of around 6% per year over the past six years.
